style: Premium creator broadcast opener: editorial Swiss-grid precision crossed with a restrained gaming HUD. Deep navy field, warm paper-white type, vivid lime signal accents, and one coral counterpoint. Asymmetric composition with a left-weighted typographic hero and a right-side signal target as the second focal point; crisp, energetic, never neon-cliche.
font: IBM Plex Sans, Space Grotesk, Arial, sans-serif

layout.secondary_focal_point: signal reticle centered near x=1590, y=360
layout.composition: Strong left text mass balanced by a smaller animated circular signal target in the upper-right; open negative-space lane through center-right; no centered stack. Headline spans 60-70% of frame width at 150-176px, uppercase, weight 700-800; subheadline 34-40px.

elements.look: localized lime radial bloom behind the signal target at 20% opacity
oversized cropped 00:08 glyphs along the lower-right edge at 12% opacity
lime monospaced-style uppercase label with two registration ticks
warm off-white two-line-capable hero type with SOON in lime
three incomplete lime rings, crosshair, and one coral locator dot
coral capsule reading CONNECTING, offset below the reticle
2px lime rule running from headline baseline toward the reticle
bottom-left 60 FPS / 1920x1080 readout and bottom-right four-step signal bars

motion_system.dominant_motif: Signal acquisition: horizontal scans and concentric lock-on motion progressively stabilize the typography.
motion_system.build: 0.00-2.20s: grid and glow wake first; a lime scan rule draws left-to-right; eyebrow snaps in; STARTING and SOON arrive from opposite x directions with brief velocity streaks and lock onto a common baseline; reticle rings draw in staggered arcs and the coral locator dot spring-pops at lock.
motion_system.breathe: 2.20-6.60s: headline remains fully legible; reticle rotates only 12 degrees while rings breathe 1.00-1.035; lime glow blooms softly; the status chip toggles CONNECTING to SIGNAL READY by a deterministic hard text swap at 4.80s; grid drifts 18px diagonally over the phase.
motion_system.resolve: 6.60-8.00s: status returns to CONNECTING, locator dot traces back to its starting bearing, ring rotation unwinds, ghost counter returns to 00:08, and the headline makes a tiny 1.015-to-1 settle. End frame matches the opening field and decorative positions for a seamless OBS loop; hero copy remains visible through the boundary.
motion_system.easing: power4.out for hero impacts, expo.out for rule/reticle assembly, sine.inOut for bounded ambience, power2.inOut for loop reset
motion_system.determinism: All looping motion is finite on the single paused GSAP timeline; no random values, clocks, infinite repeats, or layout-property tweens.

customize.contrast: #F4F1E8 and #B7F34A on #07111F for primary copy; coral is limited to status and locator accents, never small body copy.

scenes.motion: Opposed horizontal kinetic slam, scan-line draw, and concentric signal lock assemble the frame.
Locked hero hold with bounded reticle orbit, glow bloom, micro-drift, and one status state change.
Signal geometry and background drift precisely unwind to their opening state while copy holds.
